cargo-addsrows: Qaab-dhismeedkani wuxuu safafka ku darayaa jadwalka " $1 ", kaas oo lagu sheegay qaab-dhismeedka $2 .
cargo-addsrows-missingdeclare: Qaab-dhismeedkani wuxuu safafka ku darayaa miiska " $1 ", kaas oo aan lagu dhawaaqin qaab-dhismeed kasta.
cargo-notable: Khalad: Magaca jadwalka waa in la cayimaa.
right-recreatecargodata: Dib u abuur xogta ku jirta jadwalada xamuulka
action-runcargoqueries: Socodso su'aalo xamuul oo aan kala sooc lahayn
right-runcargoqueries: Socodsii su'aalaha xamuulka ee aan kala sooca lahayn
grant-group-cargo: Abuur, weydii oo tirtir xogta iyada oo loo marayo kordhinta xamuulka
grant-cargo: Abuur, weydii oo tirtir xogta iyada oo loo marayo kordhinta xamuulka
cargo-logdesc: Kani waa diiwaanka falalka la xiriira kordhinta xamuulka.
cargo-replacetableaction: miiska xamuulka $2 wuxuu ku beddelay nooc cusub
cargo-recreatedata-desc: Dib u abuur xogta xamuulka ee qaab-dhismeedkan?
cargo-recreatedata-recreatetable: Ma rabtaa inaad dib u abuurto jadwalka Cargo "$1"?
cargo-recreatedata-createdata: Dib u abuur xogta xamuulka ee qaab-dhismeedkan?
cargo-recreatedata-tablecreated: Dib ayaa loo abuuray jadwalka Cargo "$1".
cargo-recreatedata-job-creation-failed: Abuuritaanka shaqooyin lagu buuxiyo miiska xamuulka " $1 " wuu fashilmay.
cargo-recreatedata-replacementcreated: Miiska beddelka ah ee dib loo sameeyay ee miiska xamuulka " $1 ".
cargo-recreatedata-success: Xogta ayaa dib loo abuuri doonaa.
cargo-viewdata-tablestooltip: Liis garee hal ama in ka badan oo jadwal ah si aad u weydiiso. Magacyada loogu talagalay jadwalka waxaa loo dejin karaa "TableName=Alias". Tusaale: $1
cargo-viewdata-tablesrequired: Fadlan geli ugu yaraan hal miis.
cargo-viewdata-fieldstooltip: Liiska meelaha la soo bandhigi doono. Qiimaha caadiga ah waa " $1 ". Magaca loo yaqaan "FieldName=Alias" waxaa loo dejin karaa "FieldName=Alias". Tusaale: $2
cargo-viewdata-wheretooltip: Geli xaaladaha(ha). Xaalado badan waxaa loo kala saari karaa IYO/AMA. Tusaale: $1
cargo-viewdata-joinontooltip: Waa qasab marka la geliyo miisas badan. Tusaale: $1
cargo-viewdata-joinonrequired: Haddii ay jiraan jadwalo badan, waa in la dejiyaa xaalad ah "ku biir".
cargo-viewdata-groupbytooltip: Isku dar safafka leh qiime isku mid ah oo loogu talagalay goobahan(yada) hal saf. Tusaale: $1
cargo-viewdata-havingtooltip: Geli shuruudo si aad u soo celiso oo keliya safafka leh qiimayaal guud oo gaar ah. Tusaale: $1
cargo-viewdata-orderbytooltip: Liiska meelaha si aad u kala saarto natiijooyinka weydiinta. Qiimaha caadiga ah waa _pageName ASC.
cargo-viewdata-limittooltip: Geli tirada ugu badan ee natiijooyinka la soo bandhigayo. Qiimaha caadiga ah waa $1 .
cargo-viewdata-offsettooltip: Qeex tirada safafka la boodayo. Qiimaha caadiga ah waa $1 .
cargo-viewdata-formattooltip: Deji qaabka aad natiijooyinka ku soo bandhigi karto.
cargo-query-missingformat: Khalad: Qaabka waa in la dejiyaa.
cargo-query-badalias: Khalad: Magaca miiska oo aan sax ahayn " $1 ".
cargo-query-unknowndbtable: Khalad: Ma jiro jadwal xog ururin oo lagu magacaabo " $1 ".
cargo-query-unknownfieldfortable: Khalad: Lama helin goob loogu magac daray " $1 " jadwalka xogta " $2 ".
cargo-query-unknownfield: Khalad: Lama helin goob lagu magacaabo " $1 " mid ka mid ah jadwalada xogta ee la cayimay.
cargo-query-missingparam: Khalad: Halbeegga " $1 " waa in loo dejiyaa qaabka " $2 ".
cargo-query-specifiedfieldmissing: Khalad: beerta " $1 ", oo loo qeexay " $2 ", waa inay ka mid tahay meelaha su'aashan.
cargo-cargotables-columncountinfo: Ma tirinayo meelaha ku dhex jira sida $1 .
cargo-cargotables-specialtables: Jadwallada gaarka ah ee soo socda ayaa jira:
cargo-cargotables-beingpopulated: '''Fiiro gaar ah:''' Hal ama in ka badan oo ka mid ah jadwalkan ayaa hadda la buuxinayaa, iyada oo loo marayo safka shaqada.
cargo-cargotables-tablelist: Shaxda soo socota ee {{PLURAL:$1| waa|jadwallada waa}}:
cargo-cargotables-totalrows: Shaxdani waxay leedahay ''' $1 ''' {{PLURAL:$1| saf|safaf}} gebi ahaanba.
cargo-cargotables-replacementgenerated: Jadwal beddel ah ayaa loo sameeyay jadwalkan
cargo-recreatedata-createreplacement: Dib u abuur xogta jadwalka beddelka ah, adigoo kan hore u haynaya su'aal weydiinta.
cargo-recreatedata-replacementexists: Hadda dib uma abuuri karo jadwalka " $1 "; jadwalka beddelka ah " $2 " wali wuu jiraa.
cargo-cargotables-replacementtable: Shaxdan waxaa loogu talagalay in lagu beddelo jadwalka $1 . Wali looma isticmaalo su'aalaha.
cargo-cargotables-deletereplacement: Ama, haddii aadan rabin inaad waligaa isticmaasho jadwalkan beddelka ah, waad tirtiri kartaa [ $1 ].
cargo-cargotables-hasreplacement: Jadwalkan hadda waa mid la akhrin karo oo keliya, halka jadwal beddel ah loo sameeyay.
cargo-deletetable-confirm: Ma rabtaa inaad tirtirto jadwalka Cargo $1?
cargo-deletetable-replacementconfirm: Tirtir [ $1 jadwalka beddelka] ee miiska xamuulka $2 ? Tani saameyn kuma yeelan doonto miiska tooska ah.
switchcargotable: Beddel miiska xamuulka ee beddelka ah
cargo-pagevalues-tableinfo-numrows: $1 {{PLURAL:$1| safka waa|safafku waa}} loogu kaydiyay boggan
cargo-drilldown-docu: Isticmaal shaandhada hoose si aad u yareyso natiijooyinka.
cargo-drilldown-addanothervalue: Guji fallaarta si aad ugu darto qiime kale
cargo-drilldown-novalues: Ma jiraan wax qiimo ah oo loogu talagalay shaandhadan
cargo-drilldown-nomatches: Lama heli karo wax ciyaar ah
cargo-downloadzip-invalidformat: Goobta la weydiiyey kuma jiraan qiimayaasha nooca faylka
cargo-declare-must-from-template: Khalad: #cargo_declare waa in laga soo wacaa bogga qaab-dhismeedka.
cargo-declare-tablenm-is-sql-kw: Khalad: " $1 " looma isticmaali karo magaca miiska xamuulka, sababtoo ah waa erey muhiim ah oo SQL ah.
cargo-declare-tablenm-is-cargo-kw: Khalad: "$1" loo adeegsan kari maayo magaca jadwalka Cargo, sababtoo ah horay ayuu u ahaa kalmad fure u ah Cargo.
cargo-declare-parenttable-bad-parameter: Khalad: " $1 " ma aha halbeeg loo oggol yahay _parentTables.
cargo-declare-field-parse-fail: Khalad: ma kala saari karin nooca goobta " $1 ".
cargo-declare-bad-hierarchy-type: Khalad: Goobta tirinta kala sarreynta looma abuuri karo nooca " $1 ".
cargo-declare-ne1-startdttm: Khalad: Waxaa jiri kara hal goob oo keliya oo ah nooca Taariikhda Bilowga ama Waqtiga Bilowga.
cargo-declare-ne1-enddttm: Khalad: Waxaa jiri kara hal goob oo keliya oo ah nooca Taariikhda Dhammaadka ama Waqtiga Dhammaadka.
cargo-declare-def-start-before-end: Khalad: Beerta nooca Taariikhda Dhammaadka ama Taariikhda Dhammaadka waa in lagu dhawaaqaa ka dib goobta nooca Taariikhda Bilowga ama Taariikhda Bilowga.
cargo-declare-parenttable-no-field: Khalad: Jadwalka waalidka " $1 " ma laha goob " $2 ".
cargo-declare-invalid-localfield: Khalad: Magaca beerta aan sax ahayn " $1 " ayaa loo cayimay _localField.
cargo-declare-validate-has-whitespace: Khalad: $1 magaca " $2 " waxa ku jira meelo bannaan. Meelaha bannaan ee nooc kasta ah looma oggola; tixgeli inaad isticmaasho xariiqyo hoose ("_").
cargo-declare-validate-starts-underscore: Khalad: $1 magaca " $2 " wuxuu ku bilaabmaa hoos-hoos; tan lama oggola.
cargo-declare-validate-ends-underscore: Khalad: $1 magaca " $2 " wuxuu ku dhammaadaa hoos-hoos; tan lama oggola.
cargo-declare-validate-gt1-underscore: Khalad: $1 magaca " $2 " wuxuu ka kooban yahay in ka badan hal xariiq oo isku xigta; tan lama oggola.
cargo-declare-validate-bad-character: Khalad: $1 name " $2 " kuma jiri karo mid ka mid ah jilayaasha soo socda: $3
cargo-declare-validate-name-sql-kw: Khalad: "$1" loo adeegsan kari maayo magaca $2 ee Cargo, sababtoo ah waa kalmad fure u ah SQL.
cargo-declare-validate-name-cargo-kw: Khalad: "$1" loo adeegsan kari maayo magaca jadwalka Cargo, sababtoo ah horay ayuu u ahaa kalmad fure u ah Cargo.
cargo-declare-validate-empty-name: Khalad: Magaca $1 ma noqon karo mid madhan.
